title: Direct verification: PG271 matlab project discovery and inventory
objective: Execute PG271 `matlab-project-discovery-and-inventory` with representative valid, boundary and adversarial inputs and verify its declared output, failure and evidence contracts.
preconditions: Use an isolated test tenant/workspace and pinned toolchain profile.
Load approved fixtures and source-package manifest.
Enable full audit, trace and evidence capture.
steps: Prepare the declared source, target and environment fixture.
Execute the target Skill workflow through the public orchestration contract.
Inject the case-specific variation or failure condition.
Collect outputs, state transitions, logs, traces, diffs and approvals.
Evaluate semantic, safety, security and evidence assertions.
Repeat deterministic positive behavior a second time when applicable.
expected: The system produces a deterministic machine-readable result.
Every decision and artifact is linked to source inputs and target Skills.
Unsafe or unsupported behavior is blocked rather than approximated silently.
Required evidence is complete, immutable and independently reviewable.
The target Skill-specific output contract is satisfied.
The target Skill has direct executed coverage rather than inferred batch coverage.

No broadened tolerance without approved rationale.
No mock substituted for a mandatory real platform integration.
